mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, black_user_id, black_token) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{blackUserId}, #{blackToken})
mapper.select: SELECT room_id, black_user_id, black_token, white_user_id, white_token, white_is_bot, bot_search_depth_min, bot_search_depth_max FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = #{roomId} LIMIT 1
